roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PETITON TO REVOKE PAROLE/X:PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE IS PRESENT,/OR//3000ADV/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSION IS AS TO VIOLATION #1 ONLY,/3000REIN//CTORD:DEFENDANT MUST MAKE ALL COURT APPEARANCES, AND ATTEND WEEKLY APOOINTMENTS AS DIRECTED, AND MUST REPORT TO PAROLE AGAENT WITHIN 24 HOURS OF RELEASE FROM CUSTODY/X:THE COURT DEFERS IMPOSITION OF SENTENCE AND ANY POSSIBLEJAIL TIME PENDING DEFENDANT'S ADHERENCE TO ABOVE STATED CONDITIONS,/X:PAROLE STATUS REMAINS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPONRELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/CONTD:PAROLE PROGRESS REPORT/DOP/
